zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Thornhill於1233年出生在英國越可爾恩爾時，她的父親John de Thornhill53歲，母親Olivia Mare41歲。她和Sir Richard de Tankersley至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1278年在英國越可爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Thornhill于1233年出生在英国越可爾恩爾时，她的父亲John de Thornhill53岁，母亲Olivia Mare41岁。她和Sir Richard de Tankersley至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1278年在英国越可爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Thornhill was born in 1233, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Thornhill, was 53 and her mother, Olivia Mare, was 41. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Sir Richard de Tankersley. She died in 1278, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Thornhill est née en 1233, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Thornhill, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Olivia Mare, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Richard de Tankersley. Elle est décédée en 1278, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Thornhill 1233 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Thornhill 53 und ihre Mutter Olivia Mare 41. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard de Tankersley mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1278 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Thornhill è nata il nel 1233 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Thornhill, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Olivia Mare, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Sir Richard de Tankersley. Morì nel 1278, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Thornhillが1233年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父John de Thornhillは53歳，母Olivia Mareは41歳であった。彼女はSir Richard de Tankersleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1278年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Thornhill(이)가 1233년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Thornhill(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Olivia Mare(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard de Tankersley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 요르크실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Thornhill nasceu em 1233, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Thornhill, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Olivia Mare, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Sir Richard de Tankersley. Ela faleceu em 1278, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Thornhill родилась в 1233 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Thornhill было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Olivia Mare, 41. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Sir Richard de Tankersley. Она умерла в 1278 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Thornhill nació en 1233, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Thornhill, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Olivia Mare, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Sir Richard de Tankersley. Murió en 1278, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
